items.question: How does CV Doktoru work?
items.answer: Upload your CV and our AI analyzes your strengths, weaknesses, missing keywords, and ATS compatibility within seconds.

items.question: Is my CV and data safe?
items.answer: Your uploaded CVs are tied to your account only and are never shared with other users. See our Privacy Policy for details.

items.question: What file formats can I upload?
items.answer: You can upload PDF, DOC, and DOCX files, with full support for special characters.

items.question: Why do I need to verify my email?
items.answer: Email verification is required to use AI-powered analysis, rewriting, and job matching features. It doesn't affect signing up, logging in, or uploading CVs.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: All features are currently available for free.

aiTools.heading: Improve with AI
aiTools.historyEmpty: You haven't generated any AI output yet.
aiTools.copyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically — please select and copy manually.

descriptions.summary_rewrite: Rewrites your profile summary with sharper, more effective language.
descriptions.experience_rewrite: Strengthens your experience bullets with measurable achievements.
descriptions.skills_rewrite: Organizes your skills list so it stands out.
descriptions.ats_optimization: Optimizes your CV for applicant tracking systems.
descriptions.cover_letter: Generates a personalized cover letter for the role.
descriptions.linkedin_summary: Generates a ready-to-use summary for your LinkedIn profile.
descriptions.ats_keyword_insertion: Naturally weaves the missing keywords into your CV.

coverLetter.title: Generate Cover Letter
coverLetter.description: Add a few details to tailor the letter to the job you're targeting.

aiOutput.shareFallback: Sharing isn't supported here, copied to clipboard instead.

summary_rewrite.whatFor: Rewrites the profile summary at the top of your CV to grab a recruiter's attention in the first few seconds.
summary_rewrite.howToUse: Paste this text over your current profile summary section, updating any details as needed.

experience_rewrite.whatFor: Rewrites your experience bullet points with stronger, measurable-achievement-driven language.
experience_rewrite.howToUse: Compare the bullets to your current experience section and copy over the ones that represent you best.

skills_rewrite.whatFor: Reorganizes your skills list to highlight the abilities that should stand out most.
skills_rewrite.howToUse: Transfer the list into your CV's skills section, keeping only the skills you genuinely have.

ats_optimization.whatFor: Suggests content and keyword changes so your CV is parsed better by applicant tracking systems (ATS).
ats_optimization.howToUse: Apply the suggested changes to the relevant sections of your CV, weaving in missing keywords naturally.

cover_letter.whatFor: Generates a personalized cover letter draft tailored to the role you're targeting.
cover_letter.howToUse: Review the letter in your own voice, add company-specific details, and send it with your application.

linkedin_summary.whatFor: Generates a ready-to-use, professional summary for your LinkedIn "About" section.
linkedin_summary.howToUse: Paste the text into your LinkedIn "About" section, adding a personal touch if you'd like.

ats_keyword_insertion.whatFor: Shows your CV with the keywords missing for this specific job naturally woven in.
ats_keyword_insertion.howToUse: Compare the result to your current CV and update the sections where the missing keywords were added.

interview_prep.whatFor: Lets you preview likely technical and HR interview questions for this specific job.
interview_prep.howToUse: Prepare short answers to the questions so you can walk into the interview with more confidence.

salary_estimation.whatFor: Gives a realistic salary range estimate based on your experience, the role, and the location you entered.
salary_estimation.howToUse: Use this range as a reference point in salary negotiations — it's an estimate, not a guaranteed offer.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: User, content, and AI usage summaries.

sections.title: Data We Collect
sections.body: When you create an account, we store your name and email address. When you use the service, we store the CV files you upload and the analysis and matching results generated from them.

sections.title: How We Use Your Data
sections.body: Your data is used solely to provide the CV analysis, AI-powered recommendations, and job matching service to you.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell or share your data with third parties. During analysis, your CV content is sent to our AI provider (OpenAI) only for the purpose of generating the result.

sections.title: Data Retention and Deletion
sections.body: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. You can delete your account or a specific CV at any time, or contact our support team.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your data. Contact us if you have any questions.

sections.title: Description of Service
sections.body: CV Doktoru provides AI-powered CV analysis, rewriting suggestions, and job matching.

sections.title: User Responsibilities
sections.body: You are responsible for the security of your account and the accuracy of the information you provide. You may not use the service for unlawful purposes.

sections.title: About AI-Generated Output
sections.body: Analysis, suggestion, and matching results are generated by AI; they are advisory in nature and carry no guarantee of accuracy. Final decisions remain yours.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: The CV content you upload belongs to you. The platform's design and software belong to CV Doktoru.

sections.title: Changes to the Service
sections.body: We may update the service and these terms from time to time. We will try to notify you of material changes.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: You can reach us at destek@cvdoktoru.app with any questions.

pricing.title: Free today, even more powerful soon.
pricing.subtitle: The Free plan gives you every core feature of CV Doktoru. Pro is being prepared for heavier usage.
pricing.billingNote: We're currently setting up our billing infrastructure. Pricing and purchasing for the Pro plan will go live soon — this page is informational for now.

free.name: Free
features: 20 AI generations per hour (cover letters, ATS optimize, rewrites, etc.)
Version history and AI output archive

items.question: Can I upgrade to Pro right now?
items.answer: Not yet — we're setting up our billing infrastructure. We'll prioritize and notify everyone who clicks "Upgrade to Pro" once it's live.

items.question: What exactly counts toward the hourly limit of 20 AI generations?
items.answer: Cover letters, ATS optimization, profile/experience/skills rewrites, LinkedIn summaries, interview prep, and salary estimates. CV analysis and job matching are not counted — those are unlimited.

items.question: Can I keep using the Free plan?
items.answer: Yes. The Free plan will remain available once Pro goes live.

upgradeModal.title: You've used this hour's AI generations
upgradeModal.description: The Free plan allows 20 AI generations per hour. The limit resets automatically every hour.

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: View and manage your account information.

danger.heading: Danger Zone
danger.description: Deleting your account permanently removes all your data, including your CVs, analyses, job matches, and AI outputs. This action cannot be undone.
danger.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
danger.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. Enter your password to continue.
